overall.description: A first-person walk through Night City from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, holographic billboards, and futuristic vehicles. The player character navigates street corners and crosswalks in a dense cyberpunk urban environment with wet reflective streets and heavy neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with towering neon skyscrapers

events.description: camera tilts upward to look up at the towering skyscrapers with green neon lighting
camera tilts back down to street level to continue walking

agents.ego_description: walking across the yellow-striped crosswalk and pausing to gaze up at the towering neon-lit buildings

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians standing at the street corner waiting near the crosswalk
green sports car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: black pole with glowing green digital display showing number 40
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing with WAIT text
towering glass building with vertical green neon accents and illuminated windows
elevated roadway structure with vehicles passing overhead and support columns

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a street corner in a cyberpunk city at night. The camera crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk while two pedestrians wait at the corner. A green sports car passes through the intersection. Midway through, the camera tilts upward to reveal towering skyscrapers with green neon lighting against the night sky before returning to street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane futuristic urban street with elevated highways

events.description: orange van speeds quickly through the intersection from right to left
camera turns right while continuing forward toward the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing through the intersection toward the opposite sidewalk while navigating around vehicles

notable_agents.action: orange delivery van passing quickly through the intersection

entered.detail: building facade with large illuminated advertisements and horizontal yellow neon light strips
futuristic white vehicle driving along the street with headlights on

segments.scene_description: Moving through the wide intersection, the camera passes various futuristic vehicles including a distinctive orange van. The elevated highway ramp shifts to the left as the camera approaches the opposite sidewalk. Commercial buildings with bright billboards line the right side while the camera turns slightly right to approach the curb.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk with dense neon signage and pharmaceutical building

events.description: moving from open street onto the sidewalk alongside commercial buildings
begins following a pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk following a pedestrian toward a dense commercial district with heavy neon signage

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the intersection

entered.detail: large green neon medical cross sign with PHARMACEUTICALS text in bright green
metal barrier with yellow posts separating sidewalk from the street
multiple floating digital billboards displaying various advertisements between buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions onto a concrete sidewalk, following a pedestrian ahead. A prominent green neon pharmaceuticals sign glows on the right side of the building. The sidewalk is lined with railings on the left, and holographic advertisements float in the distance. The environment becomes denser with neon signage as the camera approaches a major commercial intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: major commercial intersection with dense holographic advertising and circus building

events.description: entering major intersection surrounded by buildings covered in dense neon and holographic advertisements
crossing the wide intersection while futuristic vehicles pass by on the left

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection surrounded by towering buildings covered in dense neon advertisements and holographic billboards

notable_agents.action: person standing on the corner near the crosswalk looking at their phone

entered.detail: large building with prominent CIRCUS signage in white letters and yellow neon trim around the roof
wide crossroads with yellow grid markings and multiple crosswalks converging
dense array of floating digital advertisements and neon signs between the skyscrapers

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a major commercial intersection dominated by the Circus building on the right with its prominent signage. The camera crosses the wide intersection surrounded by dense holographic advertisements floating between skyscrapers. Various futuristic vehicles drive through the intersection while pedestrians navigate the crosswalks. The scene is filled with vibrant neon lights from all directions, creating a quintessential cyberpunk city atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a quiet street corner into the heart of a dense, neon-saturated commercial district. It begins by crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk as a green sports car passes through the intersection, with the camera briefly tilting upward to capture towering green skyscrapers before returning to street level. As the camera moves through the wide intersection past an orange van, the view shifts toward a line of bright commercial billboards and an elevated highway ramp. The scene then transitions onto a concrete sidewalk, following a pedestrian past a glowing green pharmaceuticals sign and floating holographic advertisements. Finally, the camera enters a major commercial hub dominated by the Circus building, crossing a wide intersection filled with vibrant neon lights and futuristic vehicles amidst a forest of floating holograms.
